fetch_primary.title: Rosemont Immigrant Letters Archive accession history
fetch_primary.content: Accession note 1 states that the Rosemont Immigrant Letters Archive began in the parish classroom at 11 Juniper Square. It moved to the present repository in 1998; the note gives no reason for the move.
